creator: bedreddinsahbaz@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

My FreeBSD version is 13. Hardware i386. I installed drm-fbsd13-kmod packet for AMD/ATI HD 3450 display card. I used pkg install command for installation. And  then i take this error after "X -configure" command;

amdgpu_device_initialize: DRM version is 2.50.0 but this driver is only compatible with 3.x.x

What is this error? How fix it?

Thanks..
